response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Discovered minor inaccuracies in the reference JSON (e.g., '持つ未来' -> '紡ぐ未来', 'Cantada al Barya' -> 'Cantar al alba', 'ティアレ' -> 'ティアラに') and corrected them using the hardcoded on-screen lyrics and clear audio phonetics. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used as a baseline but heavily corrected via manual transcription for both the song performance and the spoken closing speech. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to the vocal delivery, including the rapid-fire lines of the song. Visual text subtitles were created for the long-running thank-you slide at the end to ensure non-Japanese speakers can fully experience the VTuber's message.

subtitles.english: The dream hasn't woken up yet.

subtitles.original: Ring my name 響かせるわ
subtitles.english: Ring my name, I'll make it resound!
The future we spin from now on...

subtitles.original: Bloom it now 咲き誇れば
subtitles.english: Bloom it now! If it blooms in full,

subtitles.original: 明け方まで気高く踊る
琥珀色のマスカレード

subtitles.english: Dancing wildly as if about to break!

subtitles.original: Ring my name 響かせるわ
subtitles.english: Ring my name, I'll make it resound!
The future we spin from now on...

subtitles.original: これからも私についてきてください！
subtitles.english: Please keep following me from now on as well!

subtitles.original: 以上、響咲リオナでした！
ありがとうございました！

[画面メッセージ]
響咲リオナ生誕祭2026
お越しいただき、ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english:
[On-Screen Message]
Hibiki Riona Birthday Celebration 2026
Thank you for coming!

subtitles.original:
これからも皆さんとずっと一緒に居たい
貴方の居場所でありたい！
subtitles.english:
I want to be with you all forever...
I want to be a place where you belong!

subtitles.original:
お届けしたパフォーマンスが貴方の心に
少しでも何かを残せているといいな
subtitles.english:
I hope the performance I delivered
has left something in your heart, even if only a little.

subtitles.original:
本当に本当にありがとう！！
愛しています。
subtitles.english:
Thank you so, so much!!
I love you.
